companies.name: Universal - Songs Of PolyGram International, Inc.

title: After Hours
notes:
Standard black vinyl US pressing.

Issued in a gatefold cover with printed credits inner sleeves.

Tracks are numbered sequentially on the back cover and inner sleeves.

Runouts are hand-etched apart from GZ Media's identifiers, which are laser-etched.

[Back cover, gatefold and labels:]
℗ & © 2020 The Weeknd XO, Inc.
Marketed by Republic Records, a division of UMG Recordings, Inc.
Distributed by Universal Commercial Services

[Inner sleeves:]
[A1] Recorded at Henson Recording Studios (Los Angeles, CA) & XO Studios (Hidden Hills, CA)
Mixed at XO Studios (Hidden Hills, CA) & Republic Studios (Los Angeles, CA)
[A2] Recorded at Henson Recording Studios (Los Angeles, CA), Republic Studios (Los Angeles, CA) & Elysian Park (Los Angeles, CA)
Mixed at XO Studios (Hidden Hills, CA) & Republic Studios (Los Angeles, CA)
[A3] Produced For MXM Productions, WolfCousins Productions
Recorded at MXM Studios (Los Angeles, CA) & (Stockholm, Sweden) & House Mouse Studios (Stockholm, Sweden)
Mixed at Mixstar Studios, (Virginia Beach, VA)
[A4] Produced For MXM Productions, WolfCousins Productions
MXM Studios (Los Angeles, CA) & (Stockholm, Sweden), Conway Studios (Los Angeles, CA), Jungle City Studios (New York, NY) and House Mouse Studios (Stockholm, Sweden)
Mixed at Mixstar Studios, (Virginia Beach, VA)
Contains interpolations from "Your Song" written by E. John and B. Taupin.
Published by Universal Songs of Polygram Int., Inc. (BMI) and Universal/Dick James Music Ltd. (PRS).
[B1] Recorded at Jungle City Studios (New York, NY)
Mixed at XO Studios (Hidden Hills, CA) & Republic Studios (Los Angeles, CA)
[B2] Recorded at Noble Street Studio (Toronto, ON)
Mixed at XO Studios (Hidden Hills, CA) & Republic Studios (Los Angeles, CA)
[B3] Recorded at XO Studios (Hidden Hills, CA) & Noble Street Studio (Toronto, ON)
Mixed at XO Studios (Hidden Hills, CA) & Noble Street Studio (Toronto, ON)
[B4] Recorded at XO Studios (Hidden Hills, CA)
Mixed at XO Studios (Hidden Hills, CA) & Republic Studios (Los Angeles, CA)
[C1] Produced For MXM Productions, WolfCousins Productions
Recorded at MXM Studios (Los Angeles, CA) & Jungle City Studios (New York, NY)
Mixed at Mixstar Studios, Virginia Beach, VA
[C2] Produced For MXM Productions, WolfCousins Productions
Recorded at MXM Studios (Los Angeles, CA) & (Stockholm, Sweden) Conway Studios (Los Angeles, CA) and House Mouse Studios (Stockholm, Sweden)
Mixed at Mixstar Studios, Virginia Beach, VA
Horns And Percussion Recorded and Edited in BLND Studio, Sweden
[C3] Produced For MXM Productions, WolfCousins Productions
Recorded at MXM Studios (Los Angeles, CA) & (Stockholm, Sweden) Conway Studios (Los Angeles, CA), Jungle City Studios (New York, NY) and House Mouse Studios (Stockholm, Sweden)
Mixed at Mixstar Studios, Virginia Beach, VA
[D1] Recorded at Republic Studios (Los Angeles, CA)
Mixed at Gaia (New York, NY) & Republic Studios (Los Angeles, CA)
[D2] Recorded at Conway Recording Studios (Los Angeles, CA) & Malibu Blue Studio (Malibu, CA)
Mixed at XO Studios (Hidden Hills, CA) & Republic Studios (Los Angeles, CA)
[D3] Recorded at Republic Studios (Los Angeles, CA)
Mixed at Gaia (New York, NY) & Republic Studios (Los Angeles, CA)
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Mastered at The Mastering Palace, New York, NY

[Publishers:]
[A1] KMR Music Royalties II SCSP, Administered by Kobalt Songs Music Publishing (ASCAP), Universal Music Corp. (ASCAP)/Sal&Co (SOCAN), Sony/ATV Ballad / Songs Of Hear The Art (BMI). Nyan King Music Inc. (SOCAN)
[A2] KMR Music Royalties II SCSP, Administered by Kobalt Songs Music Publishing (ASCAP), Universal Music Corp. (ASCAP)/Sal&Co (SOCAN), Sony/ATV Ballad / Songs Of Hear The Art (BMI), Mae Jesse And Reid Music (BMI) (administered by Sony/ATV Songs LLC)
[A3] KMR Music Royalties II SCSP, Administered by Kobalt Songs Music Publishing (ASCAP), MXM (Admin. by Kobalt) (STIM), Wolf Cousins (STIM) / Warner Chappell Music Scand (STIM)
[A4] KMR Music Royalties II SCSP, Administered by Kobalt Songs Music Publishing (ASCAP), WB Music Corp. (ASCAP) O/B/O Itself / Sal&Co (SOCAN), MXM (Admin. by Kobalt) (STIM), Wolf Cousins (STIM) / Warner Chappell Music Scand (STIM), Warp Publishing (SESAC), Universal/Dick James Music Ltd. [B2] KMR Music Royalties II SCSP, Administered by Kobalt Songs Music Publishing (ASCAP), Sony/ATV Ballad / Songs Of Hear The Art (BMI), Metro Boomin' Want Some More, Administered by Songs Of Universal, Inc. (BMI)
[B3] KMR Music Royalties II SCSP, Administered by Kobalt Songs Music Publishing (ASCAP), Metro Boomin' Want Some More, Administered by Songs Of Universal, Inc. (BMI), Sony/ATV Ballad / Songs Of Hear The Art (BMI), Warner Tamerlane Publishing Corp.
